target.title: fix: allow admins to approve dependency guard
target.body:
## Summary

- Automatically treat dependency graph changes as informational when the trusted current PR author is a repository admin or member of `@openclaw/openclaw-secops`.
- Run the trusted-author check before detect/autoscrub so trusted authors are not failed and their lockfile changes are not removed by the guard.
- Keep the existing SHA-bound `/allow-dependencies-change` override path for non-trusted PR authors.

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs test/scripts/dependency-guard-script.test.ts test/scripts/dependency-guard-workflow.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local --parallel-tests "node scripts/run-vitest.mjs test/scripts/dependency-guard-script.test.ts test/scripts/dependency-guard-workflow.test.ts"`

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Dependency guard no longer blocks or autoscrubs dependency graph changes on PRs authored by repository admins or security-group members; it posts an informational guard comment instead.
Real environment tested: Local OpenClaw checkout on macOS with the repo Vitest wrapper and autoreview helper.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs test/scripts/dependency-guard-script.test.ts test/scripts/dependency-guard-workflow.test.ts`; `git diff --check`; `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local --parallel-tests "node scripts/run-vitest.mjs test/scripts/dependency-guard-script.test.ts test/scripts/dependency-guard-workflow.test.ts"`.
Evidence after fix: Focused dependency guard script and workflow tests passed; autoreview reported no accepted/actionable findings after narrowing automatic trust to the current PR author and preserving the explicit override path for non-trusted authors.
Observed result after fix: Trusted PR authors receive an informational dependency graph comment and the guard exits successfully before autoscrub; non-trusted PR authors still follow autoscrub/block plus the SHA-bound override command path.
What was not tested: A live GitHub Actions run against an actual PR authored by a repository admin or secops member.
target.author: romneyda
